description_long: This is a two-story white house with a wraparound balcony and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The house features a flat roof and symmetrical window arrangements on both floors, providing a clean and modern appearance. In front of the house, there is a paved driveway with two parked cars and a small lawn with a palm tree. To the side, a rectangular swimming pool is surrounded by several lounge chairs on a dark deck. The balcony and porch railings are detailed with balusters, adding a touch of classic elegance. The overall layout is open and inviting, with large windows and outdoor spaces designed for relaxation and social gatherings.
description: A modern two-story white house with a wraparound balcony, flat roof, and a front porch, featuring a driveway, lawn, palm tree, and a side swimming pool with lounge chairs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, driveway with two cars, lawn with a palm tree, and partial view of the pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, palm tree, and the wraparound balcony with visible interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the balcony, symmetrical windows, and a clear view of the pool and lounge area.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool area, lounge chairs, and the driveway with cars and palm tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a covered porch, columns, steps, and a decorative railing
